examples.label: Draws bar chart:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Let ( [

	cities = List ( "Hamburg" ; "Berlin" ; "Munich" ; "Cologne" ) ;
	values = List ( 1800000 ; 3700000 ; 1500000 ; 1100000 ) ;
	
	colors = List ( "#4e79a7" ; "#f28e2b" ; "#e15759" ; "#76b7b2" ; "#59a14f" ) ;
	
	img = MBS( "GMImage.New"; "600"; "400"; "white" ) ;
	
	maxValue = Max ( 1800000 ; 3700000 ; 1500000 ; 1100000 ) ;
	
	r = MBS( "GMImage.SetStrokeColor"; img; "black" ) ;
	r = MBS( "GMImage.DrawLine"; img; 50; 350; 550; 350 ) ; // X-axis
	r = MBS( "GMImage.DrawLine"; img; 50; 50; 50; 350 ) ; // Y-axis
	
	barWidth = 80 ;
	spacing = 30 ;
	baseX = 70 ;
	
	r = Let ( [
		count = ValueCount ( cities ) ;
		colorCount = ValueCount ( colors ) ;
		r = While (
			[ i = 1 ] ; i ≤ count ;
			[
				city = GetValue ( cities ; i ) ;
				val = GetValue ( values ; i ) ;
				color = GetValue ( colors ; Mod ( i - 1 ; colorCount ) + 1 ) ;
				
				height = (val / maxValue) * 300 ;
				x1 = baseX + (i - 1) * (barWidth + spacing) ;
				x2 = x1 + barWidth ;
				y1 = 350 - height ;
				y2 = 350 ;
				
				r = MBS( "GMImage.SetFillColor"; img; color ) ;
				r = MBS( "GMImage.DrawRectangle"; img; x1; y1; x2; y2 ) ;
				
				geometry = barWidth & "x20+" & x1 & "+360" ;
				r = MBS( "GMImage.Annotate"; img; city; geometry; 5 ) ; 
				// 5 = CenterGravity
				
				i = i + 1
			] ; r )
	] ; r ) ;
	
	result = MBS( "GMImage.WriteToPNGContainer"; img; "test.png" );
	r = MBS("GMImage.Free"; img)
] ; result )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: GMImage.WriteToTiffContainer
functions.description: Writes the picture in TIFF format to a container value which you can store in a container field. For preview a JPEG version is included as well as a file name "image.tif" and the image size. See also GMImage.WriteToFile , GMImage.WriteToJPEGContainer , GMImage.WriteToPNGContainer , GMImage.WriteToBMPContainer and GMImage.WriteToGIFContainer . See Plugin.SetPreviewSize to control size of preview picture.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: The file name to use for the container. Default is "image.tif"

examples.label: Get a container value from the picture in Tiff format.
examples.text_code:
MBS
( "GMImage.WriteToTIFFContainer";
$MyImageRef
; "logo.tif" )
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "GMImage.WriteToTIFFContainer"; $MyImageRef; "logo.tif" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Convert image to 1 bit TIFF:
examples.text_code:
# Load from container
Set Variable [
$Image
; Value:
MBS
("
GMImage.NewFromContainer
";
GraphicsMagick::image
);  ]
# make black and white with threshold
Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
("
GMImage.Threshold
";
$Image
; 127);  ]
# mark as monochrome image
Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
("
GMImage.SetMonochrome
";
$Image
; 1);  ]
# set type to 1 for black/white
Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
("
GMImage.SetType
";
$Image
; 1);  ]
# set to use TIFF for compression
Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
("
GMImage.SetMagick
";
$Image
; "TIFF");  ]
# set to use CCITT 4 Fax compression
Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
("
GMImage.SetCompressType
";
$Image
; 4);  ]
# and write to a file
Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
("GMImage.WriteToTiffContainer";
$Image
; "test.tif");  ]
# cleanup
Set Variable [
$Error
; Value:
MBS
("
GMImage.Release
";
$Image
) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Load from container</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("GMImage.NewFromContainer"; GraphicsMagick::image);  </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Image</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> make black and white with threshold</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("GMImage.Threshold";$Image; 127);  </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> mark as monochrome image</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("GMImage.SetMonochrome";$Image; 1);  </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> set type to 1 for black/white</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("GMImage.SetType";$Image; 1);  </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> set to use TIFF for compression</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("GMImage.SetMagick";$Image; "TIFF");  </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> set to use CCITT 4 Fax compression</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("GMImage.SetCompressType";$Image; 4);  </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> and write to a file</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("GMImage.WriteToTiffContainer"; $Image; "test.tif");  </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("GMimage.Release";$Image) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Error</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: GMImage.WriteToWebPContainer
functions.description: Writes the picture in WebP format to a container value which you can store in a container field. We store WebP as FILE containers, so no preview in FileMaker. We tried to include a preview JPEG, but FileMaker won't show it. See also GMImage.WriteToFile , GMImage.WriteToJPEGContainer , GMImage.WriteToPNGContainer , GMImage.WriteToBMPContainer and GMImage.WriteToGIFContainer .

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: The file name to use for the container. Default is "image.webp"

examples.label: Convert to WebP:
examples.text_code:
# Load from container
Set Variable [
$Image
; Value:
MBS
("
GMImage.NewFromContainer
";
Image Scaling::InputImage
) ]
# Scale the image by the size that we enter in the size field
If [
MBS
("IsError") ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "Error" ;
$Image
]
Exit Script [ Text Result:    ]
Else
# Write image to container and set the Information text
Set Field [
Image Scaling::Result
;
MBS
("GMImage.WriteToWebPContainer";
$Image
; "test.webp") ]
# Release image
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
GMImage.Free
";
$Image
) ]
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Load from container</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("GMImage.NewFromContainer"; Image Scaling::InputImage) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Image</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Scale the image by the size that we enter in the size field</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("IsError") </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$Image </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result:    </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Write image to container and set the Information text</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("GMImage.WriteToWebPContainer"; $Image; "test.webp") </Calculation>
    <Field table="Image Scaling" id="99999" name="Result "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Release image</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("GMImage.Free";$Image) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: GMImage.XResolution
functions.description: Returns the x resolution of the image. See also density functions.
functions.result: Returns the x resolution of the image.

functions.name: GMImage.YResolution
functions.description: Returns the y resolution of the image. See also density functions.
functions.result: Returns the y resolution of the image.

functions.name: GMImage.Zoom
functions.description: Zoom image to specified size.

parameters.name: Geometry
parameters.description: The rectangle. A geometry is specified as a width and height "100x200". With an optional offset "100x200+10+20". For percent values, add a percent on the end, for % values add a %: "100x200%!"
